author: Gabriel
description: Create sidecar notes for media with Ctrl+Click, and hide the original media in file navigation if wanted. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: turingexmachina
manifest.description: Create sidecar notes for media with Ctrl+Click, and hide the original media in file navigation if wanted.
manifest.name: Media Sidecar Tools

name: Media Sidecar Tools

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.1.0] - 2026-07-13

### Features

- The sidecar notes are now opened when created with ctrl+click

### Refactor

- Remove unused `importHelpers` config on `tsconfig.json`
- Avoid !important in styles.css via selector specificity

### Build & Dependencies

- Set npm version commit message to match release convention

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## [1.0.1] - 2026-07-13

### Features

- Initial implementation of the plugin

### Bug Fixes

- Problems found in the first execution of Obsidian official automatic review

### Build & Dependencies

- *(deps)* Bump actions/checkout from 4.3.1 to 7.0.0
- *(deps)* Bump jdx/mise-action from 2.4.4 to 4.2.0
- *(deps-dev)* Bump esbuild from 0.20.2 to 0.28.1
- *(deps-dev)* Bump typescript from 5.9.3 to 7.0.2

### CI

- Add build and release actions
- Add Dependabot config
- Add git-cliff to the release workflow
